name: ASUS Pro WS WRX80E-SAGE SE WIFI II E-ATX Workstation Motherboard - Socket sWRX8 - 7x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR4 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - ASMB9-iKVM - Intel X550-AT2 Dual 10G LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - HYPER M.2 x16 Gen 4 Card
shortName: ASUS Pro WS WRX80E-SAGE SE WIFI II E-ATX Workstation Motherboard
description: High-end workstation E-ATX motherboard with sWRX8 socket supporting 7 PCIe slots and dual 10Gb networking.
